parameters.url: ={{ (function() { var params = $('Validate Input').first().json; var base = 'https://YOUR_SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF.supabase.co/rest/v1/leads_full?select=place_id,business_name,website,city,state,phone&order=scraped_at.desc'; if (params.place_ids && params.place_ids.length > 0) { return base + '&place_id=in.(' + params.place_ids.join(',') + ')'; } return base + '&or=(enriched_at.is.null,enriched_at.lt.' + new Date(Date.now() - 30*24*60*60*1000).toISOString() + ')'; })() }}

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status: 'success', leads_processed: $('Aggregate for Supabase').first().json.stats.leadsProcessed, emails_found: $('Aggregate for Supabase').first().json.stats.emailsFound, hard_blocked: $('Aggregate for Supabase').first().json.stats.hardBlocked, sitemap_fallback_used: $('Aggregate for Supabase').first().json.stats.sitemapFallbackUsed, completed_at: new Date().toISOString()}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const agg = $('Aggregate for Supabase').first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, runId: agg.runId, leadsProcessed: agg.stats.leadsProcessed, emailsFound: agg.stats.emailsFound, hardBlocked: agg.stats.hardBlocked, sitemapFallbackUsed: agg.stats.sitemapFallbackUsed, errorsLogged: agg.errorBatch ? agg.errorBatch.length : 0, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
